findings.line: "Not censure. Not review. Desertion. They want it clean."
findings.reason: Pattern 7 triple/chained negation builds a hallway to the real noun.

findings.line: "He isn't winning anymore, Sylvanas. He's only spending."
findings.reason: Pattern 5 preamble negation primes a discarded state before the real one arrives.
Pattern 2 fragment pivot uses the negated fragment as dead scaffolding.
Pattern 2 fragment pivot withholds the actual state until after the negation.

findings.line: "Not cleaner. Just louder. Like getting closer to a horn under water."
findings.deletionTest: "Just louder. Like getting closer to a horn under water."
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot rejects one descriptor before naming the usable one.
findings.suggestedFix: "Just louder. Like getting closer to a horn under water."

findings.subject: roads
findings.realAgent: the shipments and traffic moving the flour along those roads
findings.reason: Pattern 1 gives infrastructure the transport action that belongs to the traffic using it.
findings.suggestedFix: "Which roads the worst flour reached fastest."

findings.line: The sentence crossed the camp clean as an arrow.
findings.subject: sentence
findings.realAgent: Sylvanas's spoken words carrying across the quiet camp
findings.reason: Pattern 5 lets an abstract utterance perform the physical action instead of the spoken words.
findings.suggestedFix: Her words cut across the camp clean as an arrow.

findings.subject: stone
findings.realAgent: Sylvanas's limited read of the light and posture around the call
findings.reason: Pattern 5 gives an object the act of withholding usable information.

findings.line: So she watched what the body gave her.
findings.subject: body
findings.realAgent: Jaina's posture and movement cues that Sylvanas can read
findings.reason: Pattern 5 launders observable cues into an object dispensing meaning.
findings.suggestedFix: So she watched the body for clues.

findings.line: Knees remembering yesterday before today's miles had fully begun.
findings.subject: Knees
findings.realAgent: Sylvanas feeling yesterday's soreness in her knees
findings.reason: Pattern 8 gives body parts memory that belongs to the character's felt soreness.
findings.suggestedFix: Yesterday still ached in her knees before today's miles had fully begun.

audits.secondSweepNote: Dedicated pass-A P5/P6 re-read completed. Re-checked inanimate or abstract subjects for agency verbs across the full chapter; the five KILLs above survived the second sweep, while literal subject-matter and collective-actor cases were kept.

findings.line: Then farther, where the kingdom's roads thinned toward rough coast and small port marks.
findings.reason: Marked/marks exceeds the chapter cap; this cartographic use is weaker than the physical stain beats.
findings.suggestedFix: Then farther, where the kingdom's roads thinned toward rough coast and small port symbols.

findings.line: "No." Sylvanas folded the canvas flap over the marked roads herself.
findings.reason: Marked exceeds the chapter cap here and this map-reference use is less specific than the retained physical uses.
findings.suggestedFix: "No." Sylvanas folded the canvas flap over the annotated roads herself.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A still has 12 mild KILL findings across all three guides, which exceeds the 3-mild-finding pass threshold.
